creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text:
Sorry, I don’t know where to write, but after upgrading qt5 to version 5.15.0 today plasnashell started to hang. After a little torment, it turned out that it freezes when trying to load /usr/local/lib/qt5/plugins/plasmacalendarplugins/holidaysevents.so (and all similar event libraries). After disabling all the widgets where this library is mentioned, the desktop was able to load. But now, to everything else, the clock widget does not appear! I think this is a serious problem, because I had to try to load the desktop for a very long time, and now I do not have a clock or my calendar of events.

List of what was updated today:

cantor-20.04.2.txz
